narrative.description: Six months after the first Maverick war, X leads the Maverick Hunters. Players select maverick stages non-linearly, defeat bosses to gain abilities, and exploit boss weakness networks before confronting Sigma.
narrative.core_loop: Select a maverick stage, navigate platforming hazards and enemies, defeat the stage boss to earn a new weapon, and use weaknesses to optimize subsequent boss order.

mechanics.map_notes: Each maverick is weak to a weapon obtained from another boss.
mechanics.expression: Each maverick is weak to a weapon obtained from another boss.

mechanics.map_notes: Defeating mavericks grants persistent special weapons.
mechanics.expression: Defeating mavericks grants persistent special weapons.

mechanics.map_notes: Player chooses stage order from a stage-select map.
mechanics.expression: Player chooses stage order from a stage-select map.

mechanics.map_notes: Switch between eight maverick weapons plus X-Buster.
mechanics.expression: Switch between eight maverick weapons plus X-Buster.

mechanics.map_notes: Sigma stages unlock after clearing maverick stages.
mechanics.expression: Sigma stages unlock after clearing maverick stages.

mechanics.map_notes: Life energy depletes on damage; sub-tanks extend survival.
mechanics.expression: Life energy depletes on damage; sub-tanks extend survival.

mechanics.map_notes: Spikes, pits, and stage-specific hazards throughout levels.
mechanics.expression: Spikes, pits, and stage-specific hazards throughout levels.

mechanics.map_notes: Core Jump'n'Shoot combat; aim tied to X's facing.
mechanics.expression: Core Jump'n'Shoot combat; aim tied to X's facing.

mechanics.map_notes: X-Buster and weapons fire on button press.
mechanics.expression: X-Buster and weapons fire on button press.

mechanics.map_notes: Variable jump height for platforming and vertical shots.
mechanics.expression: Variable jump height for platforming and vertical shots.

mechanics.map_notes: Limited lives per stage with continue on depletion.
mechanics.expression: Limited lives per stage with continue on depletion.

mechanics.map_notes: Many mavericks change behavior at half health.
mechanics.expression: Many mavericks change behavior at half health.

mechanics.map_notes: Deterministic maverick attack cycles to learn.
mechanics.expression: Deterministic maverick attack cycles to learn.

mechanics.map_notes: Dash, wall jump, and air dash for precise traversal.
mechanics.expression: Dash, wall jump, and air dash for precise traversal.

mechanics.map_notes: Enemy and boss attacks telegraph before resolving.
mechanics.expression: Enemy and boss attacks telegraph before resolving.

mechanics.map_notes: Hold fire for charged X-Buster shots.
mechanics.expression: Hold fire for charged X-Buster shots.

mechanics.map_notes: X-Buster has no ammo economy beyond charge timing.
mechanics.expression: X-Buster has no ammo economy beyond charge timing.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Mega Man X2 through its core jump'n'shoot loop.

gdd_outline.overview: Six months after the first Maverick war, X leads the Maverick Hunters. Players select maverick stages non-linearly, defeat bosses to gain abilities, and exploit boss weakness networks before confronting Sigma.
gdd_outline.core_loop: Select a maverick stage, navigate platforming hazards and enemies, defeat the stage boss to earn a new weapon, and use weaknesses to optimize subsequent boss order.
player_goals: Build weapon toolkit via boss drops
constraints: Weapon energy limits special weapon spam
gdd_outline.progression_notes: Maverick weapons persist for the campaign; weakness edges define macro routing.
gdd_outline.combat_notes: Maverick fights telegraph patterns; correct weakness weapon shortens encounters.
gdd_outline.economy_notes: Sub-tanks and weapon energy pickups support longer maverick runs.

mechanic_relationships.notes: Maverick defeats grant weapons for the weakness graph.
Stage-select map exposes order as strategy.
Weakness weapons share ammo economy pressure.
